beast_pools.trs: “Well, the plantation owner’s wife would have overseen the household staff, managed the social calendar, and generally ensured the smooth running of the plantation’s domestic affairs. She would have had a comfortable life, although isolated, focused on maintaining her family's status. As for the enslaved people, their day would have been filled with backbreaking labor from sunrise to sunset, focused entirely on the demands of the plantation…”
